templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can initiate your return here: https://returns.richcommerce.co/return/new?c=skullshaver

templates.name: Can I skip a delivery or choose a specific shipping date?
templates.content:
You can skip any subscription shipment or item, or schedule the specific date that you would like your next order to be processed.

To do so, access your subscriptions through your Skull Shaver account login at https://skullshaver.attn.tv/sl/qsxl1_Vi. If you have not registered an account, you will need to create an account using the same email address used at checkout. Once your account is registered, access your Customer Portal by clicking on the "Manage Subscriptions" link.

templates.name: Are Skull Shavers safe for cancer patients?
templates.content: Yes, Skull Shaver electric shavers are very much safe for cancer patients. Our shavers are used in oncology centers worldwide.

templates.name: Cancel subscription
templates.content: We have a useful guide where you can read on how to cancel your subscription - https://skullshaver-2.reamaze.com/kb/subscriptions/how-do-i-cancel-my-subscriptions Let me know how it goes.

templates.name: Can you use the Pitbull Silver in the shower?
templates.content: Yes, the Pitbull Silver Pro electric shaver uses IPX5 technology and is water-resistant giving you the freedom and convenience to shaving in the shower (please do not submerge the shaver). Naturally, Pitbull men shavers are also perfectly adapted for dry shaving offering high-quality close shave and exceptional results. Pitbull Silver PRO gives you the freedom to shave the way you prefer. Wet or dry, with shaving foam or without. The results are impeccable each time.

templates.name: Difference between the Carver/Forte/Baron Head Replacement Blades
templates.content: Carver features dual cutting rings and flat foil mesh and is recommended for coarse hair. Forte features dual cutting rings and beveled foil mesh. Cutting performance between them is similar, although Forte will feel smoother as it glides across your skin due to the curved and beveled foils. Forte is our most popular and is the best choice for most people. Baron features 3 cutting rings per shaving head: two with S shaped openings, and one cutting ring with dots. Those with sensitive skin and fine hair will love this style.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://skullshaver.com/pages/shipping-and-return

templates.name: What's the difference between the Silver, Gold, and Platinum?
templates.content: Great question! You can check out the differences between the models here: https://prnt.sc/1x9a6r6

templates.name: Is a charger/adapter included with your shavers?
templates.content: Yes, a charging cord and a USB wall adapter is included with all of our shavers.

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content: You can take a look at our full warranty policy here - https://skullshaver.com/pages/warranty

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/skullshaver/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/SkullShaver

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: Our shavers are manufactured in China.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! If you'd like to be our influencer, please fill out the application here - https://skullshaver.refersion.com/?oid=97987 For sponsorship inquiries, please email us directly at cs@skullshaver.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Do you ship to PO boxes?
templates.content: Yes, we do, when you are purchasing you can just put your P.O. box information in when confirming shipping address details.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at cs@skullshaver.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: We recently started working with a third party fulfillment center where they have 12-14 different warehouses around the country. Your order will be shipped from the warehouse that is closest to your shipping address and has the items in your order in stock.

templates.name: Difference between the platinum, gold and silver shavers
templates.content: Here's all you need to know! There are 3  main differences between the different Pitbull shavers: included blade type, included accessories, and features. The Pitbull Silver comes standard with a Carver blade which is specially designed for coarse or thick hair. The Pitbull Gold and Pitbull Platinum come standard with our most popular blade, the Forte. The Pitbull Platinum has all the same features of Pitbull Gold, PLUS a wash indicator, a travel lock function, a premium travel case, and a Platinum rinse stand. The Pitbull Platinum also comes with an extended 2-year warranty, while the other two only come with a 1-year warranty.

templates.name: Do you have discreet packaging?
templates.content: All orders are sent in discreet packaging, so the true contents are a secret until opened!

templates.name: How long do the blades last?
templates.content: On average, we recommend you replace your blade every 3-6 months. The reason we suggest that is because when you have an old or clogged blade it causes the machine to slow down or stop working altogether.

templates.name: Military / First responder discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://skullshaver.com/pages/govx-id-military-discount

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out!

templates.name: Do you offer gift wrapping?
templates.content: We don't offer gift wrapping as we work with a third party fulfillment service and it's not a service they currently offer, however all orders are sent in discreet packaging, so the true contents are a secret until opened.

templates.name: Difference between the ordinary Palm Face and Head Shaver (USB Charging Cable)?
templates.content: The Silver and the Palm shaver both have the same motor but come standard with different blades. The Pitbull Silver comes standard with the Carver PRO 4 Head Replacement Blade, and the Palm 3 comes standard with the Carver PRO 3 Head Replacement Blade.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to apply for wholesale is to go here: https://skullshaver.wholesale.shopifyapps.com/accounts/sign_up For further wholesale inquiries, please email us directly at cs@skullshaver.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $49. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: If the order was placed within the last hour, you'll be able to cancel it from the order status page. Click the link in your order confirmation email, and you'll see a box to cancel the order. It's only available for 1 hour after the order is placed. If you've exceeded that window, please email us at cs@skullshaver.com to see if there is a possibility to cancel your order.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We ship via USPS First Class and Priority from our fulfillment center in New Jersey. We also ship using a variety of carriers through a third party warehouse network distributed throughout the US. Once shipped it will take 3-5 business days domestically and 1-4 weeks internationally.

templates.name: How long does it take to charge a Pitbull shaver?
templates.content: Pitbull Gold and Platinum shavers take 2.5 hours to fully charge. Pitbull Silver Shavers take 1 hour to fully charge.

templates.name: Can I shave wet or dry?
templates.content:
Most of our shavers can be used to shave wet or dry, with or without shaving cream or foam. Pitbull, Butterfly Kiss, and Palm shavers are also IPX5 water resistant, so you can safely shave in the shower. However, please do not fully submerge any of our shavers.

If you are using original Skull Shaver from 2013-2014, then you can only do dry shave. This was our first model and it comes with the engraved name as Skull Shavertm on the shaver handle/body.

templates.name: Can I use an alcohol based solution to clean the blades?
templates.content: Yes, you can use an alcohol based solution in the Rinse Stand. You can also mix isopropyl alcohol with water to create your own rinsing solution.

templates.name: Can I shave my chest or body with a Pitbull shaver?
templates.content: Yes, you can easily shave your face, head, or body with any of our shavers.

templates.name: How long does it take to charge a Butterfly Kiss shaver?
templates.content: Butterfly Kiss Shavers take 1 hour to fully charge. Please do not charge your shaver from any USB port that outputs more than 5 volts.

templates.name: Should I use shaving foam, gel, or oil? Which is recommended for a wet shave?
templates.content: We recommend shaving gel, foam, or cream over shaving oil. Shaving oil can build up in the blades and become difficult to clean. As a result, shaving oil should not be used in any 5-head blade. You can use shaving oil with the 3 or 4 head PRO blades, but they should be thoroughly cleaned from time to time.

templates.name: How long does it take to charge a Beast Clipper?
templates.content: The Beast Clipper will take 4 hours to fully charge from a completely dead battery. Once fully charged, the clippers will run for up to one hour continuously.

templates.name: Can I use a different charger? What chargers can I use?
templates.content: Our shavers come with a USB charging cable so your shaver can be charged from almost any USB port, battery pack, or wall adapter that outputs 5 volts or less. Do not use any charging adapter that outputs more than 5 volts/1 amp! Using any other charger or exceeding those output specs will void your warranty and may damage the unit.

templates.name: What length combs are included?
templates.content:
The Beast Clipper comes with 8 cuttings combs. Included are a pair of
short tapered combs (left and right), a pair of longer tapered combs,
3mm, 6mm, 9mm, and 12mm combs.

templates.name: Is it safe to use with blood-thinning medication?
templates.content: Skull Shaver devices are made with high-quality materials. Skull Shaver blades will never leave you with cuts if the appliance is used properly following the instructions provided. Our shavers are used in oncology centers worldwide.

templates.name: Will the Beast Clipper cut thick hair smoothly? Does it work for very fine hair?
templates.content: Beast clipper has wide, sharp blades that can smoothly trim thick hair. Many of our customers use it on their dense beards because they love how well it powers through the coarse facial hair. The Beast Clipper also cuts very fine hair very well.

templates.name: Can I use the Beast Clipper while taking a shower? Is it waterproof?
templates.content: The Beast Clipper is not water resistant and should not be used in the shower. All of our Pitbull, Palm, and Butterfly Kiss shavers feature IPX5 water resistant construction and technology, allowing you to safely shave your head, face, or body shave in the shower. However, we do not recommend using our shavers in a bath as our shavers should never be submerged.

templates.name: Are Skull Shavers heavy? Are they difficult to use for someone who might be physically weak or have limited dexterity?
templates.content: Our products are very compact and light-weight. The ergonomic grip makes it easy to use if mobility or dexterity is limited. The handles are designed so they can be comfortably held in several different ways, making it easy to change your grip while shaving.

templates.name: Post Purchase Inquiries
templates.content: We don't handle post-purchase requests via text. Please email your request to cs@skullshaver.com or feel free to call this number 609-849-5741, Monday-Friday 8am-4pm EST. Please let me know if you have any questions about our products, I'm more than happy to help you here!

templates.name: How do I manage or change my subscriptions?
templates.content: You can access your subscriptions through your Skull Shaver account login at https://skullshaver.attn.tv/aF1cBXJmKf0D. If you have not registered an account, you will need to create an account using the same email address used at checkout. Once your account is registered, you can login and access your Customer Portal by clicking on the "Manage Subscriptions" link. From here, you can view active or inactive subscriptions, change how often you get them, skip or cancel a shipment, update your next order date, add or remove products, see upcoming shipments, and update your shipping or billing info anytime.

templates.name: Holiday returns
templates.content: For the 2025 holiday season, orders placed between November 1 and December 31 can be returned until January 31, 2026.
